name: Azusa Hamaoka
description: Azusa Hamaoka is a third-year at Oumi University and is a part of the intercollegiate diving club with Izu University. Known for her very outgoing and exhibitionist personality, she displays particular friendship/comradeship to Iori.

name: Tarou Sakamoto
description: __Height:__ 188 cm Tarou Sakamoto is a retired hitman. He was the greatest hitman, feared and revered by bad guys and hitmen everywhere. However, he left the hitman world in order to be with his wife. He currently owns a store, and has one child. He is the jack of all trades of his town, and is very popular and well liked by people in his town.

description: __Height:__ 153 cm (5') Yami no Yuugi is the spirit residing in the Milennium Puzzle. name: Kouhei Imamura
description: A first-year Mechanical Engineering student at Izu University. He is Iori's best friend and a diehard otaku, perceived to be a lolicon by his acquaintances. He happens to be particularly obsessed with the little sister character trope (hence his obsession with Shiori Kitahara). While many are repulsed by his otaku lifestyle, he is indifferent to how he is perceived by others.

name: Yuuko Aioi
description: An energetic high school girl with short brown hair. One of her negative sides is that she is often too lazy to do her own homework and always copies from either [Mio](https://anilist.co/character/40081) or [Mai](https://anilist.co/character/10421).

name: Tanaka
